name: dr-nearby-monorepo
description: Main entry point to run all Dr.Nearby services.

scripts.start-backend: concurrently -n "GATEWAY,PATIENT,DOCTOR,ADMIN,CONSULT" -c "cyan,green,magenta,yellow,blue" "node apps/api-Gateway/server.js" "node apps/Patient-service/server.js" "node apps/Doctor-service/server.js" "node apps/admin-service/server.js" "node apps/Consultation-service/server.js"
